queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(o.o_orderkey)
FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer AS c
  WHERE c.c_custkey + 1 = o.o_custkey + 1
);

theorem.description: Count ORDERS rows without a matching CUSTOMER via NOT EXISTS on +1 adjusted keys
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-ANTI-ORDERS-CUSTOMER-PLUS1
